name: Maasai Mara Safari Adventure
info: Experience the world-famous Maasai Mara with guided game drives and luxury camping under the African sky.

name: Diani Beach Getaway
info: Relax on the white sandy beaches of Diani with crystal clear waters and tropical sunshine.

name: Mount Kenya Hiking Expedition
info: Climb Africa’s second-highest mountain with experienced guides and breathtaking alpine scenery.

name: Lake Nakuru Flamingo Tour
info: Explore Lake Nakuru National Park known for its flamingos, rhinos, and stunning lake views.

name: Amboseli Elephant Safari
info: See large elephant herds with Mount Kilimanjaro as the dramatic backdrop.

name: Samburu Cultural Safari
info: Discover Samburu culture and unique wildlife species only found in Northern Kenya.
